CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $629.00 FILED BY DR PINE KEVIN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MORRISON PATRICK L AND MORRISON WENDY L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-15-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-17-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF MORRISON PATRICK L AND MORRISON WENDY L

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRISON PATRICK L AND MORRISON WENDY L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DR PINE KEVIN $629.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $657.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DR PINE KEVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MORRISON PATRICK L AND MORRISON WENDY L STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DR PINE KEVIN
